hero.headline: Run your mine on autopilot.
hero.sub: AI Mining Operations Manager. Drafts your royalty filings, hedges the gold window, supervises your shifts, files your compliance. You sign once.

chat.disclaimer: AI-generated. Decisions are signed by the licence holder.

turns.body: Hi. I'm Mr. Mwikila, Borjie's AI Mining Operations Manager. What brings you here today?
I run a small PML in Geita — 12 workers, gold.

Twelve workers on a PML, perfect. Borjie drafts your monthly royalty in the Tumemadini format, hedges your gold window at the LBMA fix, and runs your shift roster from a single mobile app your supervisor unlocks at the pit. Want to see how a real Wednesday at 06:00 looks?

claims.title: Tumemadini royalty drafts pass first review.
claims.body: Every monthly royalty drafted by Borjie in the Tumemadini format passes regulator review without a rewrite. Indicative across 10 pilot mines.

claims.title: Gold-window hedges save 1.4% on the LBMA spot.
claims.body: Borjie hedges your gold at the LBMA AM-fix window automatically. Indicative pilot saving 1.4% vs spot at delivery.

claims.title: Biometric attendance lifts shift productivity 18%.
claims.body: Fingerprint clock-in at the pit gate cuts payroll leakage and lifts deliverable tonnes per shift. Pilot data across Geita and Songwe.

stats.heading: Numbers from ten live pilots.
stats.sub: Twelve weeks of co-development with mining operators across Geita, Mererani, and Songwe. Indicative figures from pilot telemetry, refreshed weekly.
stats.footnote: Numbers refresh from pilot telemetry. Hedged TZS reflects M3-M4 wave; live pilot dashboard updates weekly.

finalCta.heading: Stop chasing the dashboard. Start running the mine.
finalCta.sub: Twenty pilot slots remain. No cost. Twelve weeks. You set the autonomy pace — we ship the brain that handles overnight ops and the audit chain that keeps every action on the record.
finalCta.microcopy: Free during pilot. No card required. Cancel anytime.

drillhole.title: Drill-hole logger
drillhole.blurb: Field logger for drill holes and grade-control. Cores photographed, assayed, linked to a pit segment, written to the chain.

treasury.title: FX & treasury
treasury.blurb: TZS · USD · gold ounces. Hedge proposals against live BoT and LBMA spot. Off-take projections by week.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.blurb: Artisanal miners, registered traders, licensed smelters. KYC for every participant. One-click off-take agreements.

compliance.blurb: NEMC EIA, royalty returns, OSHA logs, audit chain. Ready for submission to Tumemadini and TRA.

Pit maps as GeoJSON or PDF
Drill-hole logs as CSV or laboratory PDF

three.label: Master Brain

three.body: Starts in shadow mode for 14 days. You see what it would have done. Then you grant authority, step by step.
bullets: Autonomy dial — you set the pace

brief.heading: Your first minute at 06:00.
brief.sub: The Master Brain handled overnight operations. Here's what it did, what it flagged, and what the numbers say.

demo.intro: Mine is calm. Three decisions need you before 09:00.

lines.body: Shift B delivered 184 t at 3.2 g/t. Logged to drill-hole log MR-241.
Vendor "Kahama Logistics" delayed payment on 12 t. Routed to you for extension approval.
Licence expires in 47 days. Tumemadini renewal form drafted for your review.
LBMA spot up 1.4% inside 6 hours. Hedge proposal for 60 oz drafted.
Quarterly emissions report submitted to NEMC. Acknowledgement #2604-A.
April royalty drafted: TZS 18.4M. Needs your signature before filing.

ask.heading: Ask. It answers.
ask.sub: Not a chatbot. The mine itself speaking in the first person, grounded in its knowledge graph, with clickable citations.
ask.question: What's my cash runway?
answerPlan: Query TZS balances across all bank accounts
Fetch gold inventory and live LBMA spot
ask.answer: You hold TZS 412M in cash and 184 oz of gold worth TZS 1.18B at today's spot. Trailing 4-week burn is TZS 87M/wk. That gives you 18.3 weeks of runway — or 22 weeks if the February Geita off-take settles on time.
ask.evidence: Evidence: TRA bank-feed · LBMA spot · off-take MR-241

showcase.title: I am the mine.
showcase.subtitle: First-person · grounded in the knowledge graph

autonomy.heading: Your pace, not ours.
autonomy.sub: Four autonomy levels. Each is clearly defined. Nothing happens without your sign-off until you say so.

levels.executeWithApproval: Acts with your approval at each step.
levels.autonomous: Acts on its own inside your policy. Red-lines still need approval.

labels.redLineBody: The Master Brain never auto-files royalty to TRA, never auto-submits NEMC EIA, and never auto-sells gold above 200 oz. At any autonomy level. Ever.

chain.heading: Every action is cryptographically on the record.
chain.sub: Append-only log with SHA-256 prev-hash and per-entry HMAC. Tumemadini, NEMC, and auditors can verify the chain without trusting us.
chain.fragmentHeader: Chain fragment · thread th_18a · last 4 entries
chain.depthFooter: Chain depth: 18,429 entries · last signed 00:04 UTC · Tumemadini-exportable NDJSON bundle

guarantees.title: SHA-256 hash chain · HMAC per entry
guarantees.body: Every row carries a prev-hash pointer plus an HMAC signature. Tampering any entry invalidates every signature after it. Export the chain, verify offline.

guarantees.title: User content is hashed, not stored
guarantees.body: A Tumemadini auditor can prove you asked X at time T without re-disclosing X. Raw text lives in the conversation memory (scoped + revocable); the chain carries provenance only.

guarantees.title: Tenant chain · Platform chain — never mixed
guarantees.body: Per-tenant audit chains are strictly isolated. Platform-scope queries land on a reserved platform chain. Cross-scope probes return empty, never leak existence.

loopValidator.heading: The validator the OODA Loop was missing — closed by design.
loopValidator.sub: Borjie ships the quality-gate validator the IEEE Spectrum + Snyk paper says agentic AI is missing. Every action Mr. Mwikila proposes passes a mandatory five-gate check before any persistence, notification, or external write.

paper.title: Agentic AI's OODA Loop Problem
paper.finding: Agents running Observe → Orient → Decide → Act loops at machine speed without an explicit validator between Decide and Act don't compound value — they compound error. The fix is a slow, explicit, validating layer that sits between the decision and the action.
paper.quote: Fast cycles to bad decisions when the validator is absent.

response.title: Five mandatory gates. AND-combined. No fast-loop bypass.
response.body: Mr. Mwikila runs every decision through the @borjie/loop-quality-gates package before it ever reaches a tool that touches the world. The composite gate runs all five checks in parallel and AND-merges the verdicts — one failure stops the loop.

gates.name: Groundedness gate
gates.blurb: Every factual claim cites a real EvidenceItem with a resolvable URL or system-of-record reference.

gates.name: Calibration gate
gates.blurb: Claimed confidence matches observed historical accuracy. Over-confident labels are downgraded or rejected.

gates.name: Brand gate
gates.blurb: Mr. Mwikila stays in voice. Design tokens only. No forbidden persona drift, no raw hex literals.

gates.name: Authority gate
gates.blurb: The action's tier must be inside the loop's granted authority. T2-Critical mutations route to a human.

gates.name: Budget gate
gates.blurb: Remaining ε-budget (tokens, wall-clock, tool calls) stays non-negative after the proposed action.

diagram.kicker: The 5-layer loop · validator gate visible between Decide and Act
diagram.gapLabel: Where IEEE + Snyk said the validator is missing
diagram.flowLabel: Loop closes back to Observe — every cycle re-grounded
diagram.caption: Observe, Orient, and Decide remain at machine speed. The Quality Gates layer slows just enough to verify groundedness, calibration, brand, authority, and budget — then Act fires. Failures route back to learning, never to the world.

pricing.heading: Clear pricing. No surprises.
pricing.sub: Five tiers. Monthly in TZS. Start free with Mwanzo. Scale when you're ready.
pricing.footnote: All prices in TZS. Payable via M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, Airtel Money, or bank transfer.

frontierBanner.title: Mining infrastructure, rewritten for the operator.
frontierBanner.sub: Borjie ships the operating system that turns a Tanzanian mining licence into a calm, audited, AI-managed business — bilingual on day one.

problemSolution.title: Mining is at the margin.
problemSolution.subOne: Tanzanian mining still runs on Excel, WhatsApp, and physical compliance binders. The deposit is world-class. The infrastructure around it is not.
problemSolution.subTwo: Borjie is the AI-native operating system the sector has been waiting for.

items.title: Royalty filings are manual
items.desc: Owners file Tumemadini returns in Excel and miss the 47-day renewal window 18% of the time. Every missed window costs a re-filing fee and burns goodwill with the regulator.

items.title: The gold window swings 2.4% a day
items.desc: Small miners hedge with WhatsApp messages to brokers in Dubai. They lose 4-6% of margin to spread, timing, and information asymmetry on every off-take.

items.title: Compliance is fragmented
items.desc: Tumemadini, NEMC, Bank of Tanzania, and TRA all want different artifacts on different cadences. The owner becomes a part-time compliance officer instead of a miner.

items.title: Workforce visibility ends at the gate
items.desc: Owners can't see who clocked in, what fuel was burned, or what incidents happened on Wednesday's B-shift. Payroll leakage and safety blindspots compound week-over-week.

items.title: Royalty drafts in Tumemadini format
items.desc: Mr. Mwikila drafts your monthly royalty in the official Tumemadini format the day after each gold parcel window closes. One-tap signature, cited line-by-line.

items.title: Gold-window hedge at LBMA fix
items.desc: The treasury desk hedges the BoT USD/gold window automatically — every hedge cited to the LBMA AM-fix. Pilot saving of 1.4% versus walk-in spot.

items.title: Compliance pack on every cadence
items.desc: Borjie files Tumemadini, NEMC, BoT, and TRA on each authority's own cadence. Hash-chain audited so the regulator can verify offline without trusting us.

items.title: Workforce console on the supervisor's phone
items.desc: Run shifts, attendance, fuel logs, and incidents from the foreman's pocket. Biometric clock-in at the pit gate lifts shift productivity by 18% on pilot sites.

ecosystem.title: Wired into every counterpart
ecosystem.sub: Borjie integrates with every regulator, market, lab, and money-rail an operator already deals with. No new portals to learn — the work flows through the systems Tanzania already trusts.

universalAccess.title: Every artifact in Swahili first.
universalAccess.sub: Every supervisor on a phone. Every owner on a tablet. Every regulator on a desktop. Borjie is the only mining OS that ships in Tanzania's working languages from line one of every screen.

cards.title: Swahili-first by default
cards.body: Every label, every brief, every regulator artifact ships in Swahili. English is one tap away. No translation lag — the language flag flips and the entire UI follows, including signed PDFs.

cards.title: Phone for the pit, tablet for the office
cards.body: Supervisors run shifts from a phone — biometric clock-in, fuel logs, incident reports. Owners review on tablet — daily brief, treasury, licence calendar. The same data, the right surface.

cards.title: Desktop for the regulator
cards.body: Tumemadini, NEMC, TRA, and audit-pack consumers get a desktop console with one-click export to NDJSON, cryptographically signed and verifiable offline.

mwikilaModes.title: Seven modes, one calm operator.
mwikilaModes.titleAccent: Switch tabs to see them work.
mwikilaModes.sub: Mr. Mwikila is Borjie's AI Mining Operations Manager. He adapts to the moment — building you a brief at 06:00, drafting your royalty at month-end, hedging your gold at the LBMA window. Pick a mode to see what he does.

modes.label: Build
modes.headline: Stands up your mining knowledge graph in 48 hours
capabilities: Imports PML/ML/SML licences via OCR and reconciles them against the Mining Commission registry
Ingests pit maps as GeoJSON or PDF and links every drill-hole to a segment
Builds your vendor, off-taker, and worker registries from existing M-Pesa and payroll records
Issues every team member their role-gated credential — owner, manager, supervisor, employee

modes.label: Strategy
modes.headline: Models the long arc — pit, treasury, workforce, market
capabilities: Simulates 12-month production against three gold-price scenarios
Projects cash runway from current burn, hedge book, and off-take pipeline
Flags PML renewals 90, 60, and 30 days out with Tumemadini drafts pre-filled
Recommends fleet, contractor, and explosives purchases against quarterly plan

modes.label: Operations
modes.headline: Runs the day from the pit gate to the wash plant
capabilities: Schedules shifts and tracks biometric clock-in on the supervisor's phone
Logs every drill-hole, assay, and grade-control measurement to the chain
Tracks fuel, lubricants, and explosives consumption against pit segments
Surfaces overnight incidents, near-misses, and equipment downtime by 06:00

modes.label: Document
modes.headline: Drafts every artifact — royalty, NEMC EIA, OSHA log
capabilities: Tumemadini royalty drafts in the official format every month
NEMC EIA and quarterly emissions report templates auto-populated from telemetry
OSHA shift log, incident report, and corrective-action notes
Off-take contracts with biometric fingerprint signature workflow

modes.label: Finance
modes.headline: Hedges the gold window, watches the cash, files the tax
capabilities: Hedges gold at the LBMA AM-fix automatically inside policy
Tracks TZS · USD · gold-ounce balances against the BoT USD cliff
Drafts VAT, PAYE, and withholding-tax returns ready for TRA filing
Settles vendor wallets through M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, and Airtel Money

modes.label: Risk
modes.headline: Five gates between every decision and the world
capabilities: Groundedness gate — every claim cites an evidence artifact
Calibration gate — confidence labels match historical accuracy
Brand gate — Mr. Mwikila stays in voice, never drifts
Authority + budget gates — tier and ε-budget enforced before any tool call

modes.label: Compliance
modes.headline: Hash-chain audited so the regulator never has to trust us
capabilities: Append-only audit chain — SHA-256 prev-hash plus per-entry HMAC
Per-tenant isolation — your chain is never co-mingled with anyone else's
Minimal disclosure — user content is hashed, not stored, on the chain
Tumemadini-exportable NDJSON bundle, verifiable offline

interactiveModes.title: Three doors into the same brain.
interactiveModes.titleAccent: Pick the one that fits the moment.
interactiveModes.sub: Borjie is everywhere a mining owner needs it: on the marketing page when you're sizing it up, on the home screen when you're learning it, and in the truck when you can't look at a screen.

modes.title: Marketing chat
modes.subtitle: Sells
modes.desc: The chat you're using right now. Mr. Mwikila answers your questions about pricing, regulators, and timelines — and books a pilot when you're ready.

preview.user: What does Borjie do for a Geita PML?
preview.ai: Drafts your Tumemadini royalty in the official format, hedges your gold at the LBMA fix, runs your shift roster on the supervisor's phone. Want to see how a real Wednesday at 06:00 looks?

sections.title: 1. What we collect
sections.body: Borjie collects your mining business data — PML/ML/SML licences, pit maps, drill-hole logs, off-take transactions, royalty returns, and your users' messages. We do not collect personal data on individual artisanal miners unless they upload it themselves or an owner directs us to.

sections.title: 2. Why
sections.body: We use this data to run your Master Brain, deliver morning briefings, prepare reports for Tumemadini and TRA, and propose gold-window hedges. We do not sell it. We do not use it for advertising.

sections.title: 3. Where it lives
sections.body: Your data is stored in a Tanzania-resident database (Dar es Salaam region, with Fly.io fra1 as DR backup). Audit chains are per-tenant — your tenant cannot read another tenant's chain even if you are an admin.

sections.title: 4. Your rights
sections.body: Under the Tanzania Personal Data Protection Act 2022 you have the right to view, correct, delete, and port your data to another vendor. Email privacy@borjie.co.tz.

sections.title: 5. Tumemadini and NEMC
sections.body: If a Tanzanian authority (Tumemadini, NEMC, TRA, FIU) lawfully demands your data we will provide it, but we will notify you within 5 days unless a gag order is in place.

sections.title: 6. Contact
sections.body: This policy is updated periodically. Material changes get a 30-day in-cockpit notice before they take effect. Questions: privacy@borjie.co.tz.

sections.title: 1. Agreement
sections.body: By using Borjie you accept these terms. Borjie is Borjie Tanzania Limited, a Tanzania-registered company (BRELA registration: pending). The agreement is governed by Tanzanian law. Jurisdiction is the High Court of Tanzania, Dar es Salaam.

sections.title: 2. Tiers and billing
sections.body: Five tiers: Mwanzo (free), Mkulima (TZS 150,000/mo), Mfanyabiashara (TZS 500,000/mo), Kampuni (TZS 1,500,000/mo), Group (bespoke). Billed monthly in advance. Non-payment for 14 days pauses autonomous actions (but never the audit chain — your history remains yours forever).

sections.title: 3. Your data is yours
sections.body: You own your mining data. We hold it on your behalf. If you close the account we will export (or delete) your data within 30 days. The audit chain remains immutable per Tumemadini record-retention rules.

sections.title: 4. Master Brain and liability
sections.body: The Master Brain executes actions on your authority. We do not warrant flawless decisions, but we warrant that every action is recorded on the audit chain. If Borjie directly causes losses through a software defect, our liability is capped at the trailing 12 months of fees.

sections.title: 5. Prohibited use
sections.body: You may not use Borjie to conceal illegal activity, evade TRA royalties, or launder funds. If we detect suspicious activity we will report it to the relevant authority as required by law.

sections.title: 6. Termination
sections.body: You or we may terminate with 30 days' notice. On termination we export your data within 60 days. We may suspend immediately for material breach.

sections.title: 7. Contact
sections.body: Terms updates: 30-day in-cockpit notice. Questions: legal@borjie.co.tz.

ownersPage.heading: Run your mine like the world's best.
ownersPage.sub: Master Brain, licence calendar, drill-hole logger, FX/treasury, marketplace and compliance — all in one calm operator.

buyersPage.heading: Source verified Tanzanian minerals. End-to-end.
buyersPage.sub: KYC'd sellers, chain-of-custody assays, biometric contract signing. Buy with confidence.
buyersPage.marketplaceFeeBody: No subscription. Free to browse and bid. Fee paid only on settled deals.

valueProps.heading: Four pillars of verified supply.
valueProps.sub: Every gram on Borjie has a verifiable path from drill-hole to weighbridge.

shortCards.title: Verified provenance
shortCards.body: Every ore parcel carries a chain-of-custody trail from drill-hole to weighbridge.

shortCards.title: KYB-verified sellers
shortCards.body: Borjie audits every PML/PL/ML licence, owner NIDA, and TRA standing before a seller can list.

shortCards.title: LBMA-grade assay certificates
shortCards.body: Gold, tanzanite, coltan, copper grades from internationally accredited labs.

shortCards.title: Biometric off-take contracts
shortCards.body: Non-repudiable fingerprint signatures — contracts enforceable in court.

provenance.title: Verified provenance
provenance.blurb: Chain-of-custody from drill-hole to weighbridge. Each transfer signed, timestamped, and written to the audit chain.

kyb.title: KYB'd sellers
kyb.blurb: Borjie audits every seller before listing. BRELA, TRA, and Tumemadini cross-checks. No anonymous traders.

assays.title: Assay certificates
assays.blurb: LBMA-grade labs in Dar es Salaam and Mwanza. Fire assay for gold, ICP-MS for coltan, gemmological certs for tanzanite.

biometric.title: Biometric off-take
biometric.blurb: Contracts signed with fingerprint plus liveness. Non-repudiable. Each signature anchored on the audit chain.

useCases.heading: Buyers already on the platform.
useCases.sub: Mock pilot relationships shown — real deals are still on-boarding. Replaced with audited case studies once live.

gold.blurb: Sources 40-60 kg/month of artisanal doré from Geita and Kahama PML clusters. Borjie chain-of-custody lets the refinery skip its own field due diligence.

tanzanite.blurb: Bids on Mererani Block-D rough every Tuesday. Borjie's gemmological cert plus biometric off-take gets the lot loaded inside 48 hours.

coltan.blurb: ICP-MS-graded coltan from Kigoma artisanal sites. Audit chain provides the OECD due-diligence trail downstream EU buyers require.

pricing.heading: Free to browse. Commission on settled deals.
pricing.sub: Buyers pay nothing to register, search, and bid. Borjie takes a 2.5% commission on the final settled price of a deal you close on the platform.
bullets: No success fee on bids that don't close
pricing.footnote: Buyer-side commission is calculated on the gross settled value, charged at off-take signing, paid in TZS or USD per contract.

downloadCta.heading: Sign up to bid.
downloadCta.sub: The buyer mobile app is in private testing with sixteen Tanzanian and East African buyers. Join the waitlist for the September 2026 public release.

investorsPage.heading: Mining capital with telemetry.
investorsPage.sub: Borjie gives lenders and LPs daily evidence-cited briefs on every deployment — production, cash runway, FX exposure, regulator status.

valueProps.heading: Four pillars of investor evidence.
valueProps.sub: Built for the lender's question: what is actually happening on the ground today.

dailyBrief.title: Daily evidence-cited reports
dailyBrief.blurb: Every morning at 06:00 each portfolio mine produces a brief covering production, cash, licence status, and incidents. Cited line-by-line to source data.

usdCliff.title: 27-Mar-2026 USD cliff remediation
usdCliff.blurb: Tracks USD exposure against the regulatory cliff date. Suggests hedges, alternative invoice currencies, and gold-window settlements.

auditPack.title: Audit-pack export
auditPack.blurb: One-click export of the cryptographic audit chain, licences, royalty returns, OSHA logs, and bank reconciliations for due diligence.

treasury.title: Treasury simulation
treasury.blurb: Stress-test off-take timing, gold price moves, and TZS/USD swings. See the impact on covenant ratios before they happen.

caseStudy.heading: Indicative deployment.
caseStudy.sub: No closed deals yet. The figures below illustrate how the Borjie audit pack would surface a typical mid-sized Geita PML cluster to a senior secured lender.

blog.heading: Field notes from Tanzanian mining.
blog.sub: Writing on licences, treasury, geology, and the slow build of an AI-native operating system for the sector.

caseStudies.heading: Pilot case studies arriving Q3 2026.
caseStudies.sub: Ten pioneer operators across Geita, Mererani, and Songwe are running 12-week pilots. Once the first cohort completes we'll publish full case studies — production lift, cash-cycle compression, audit findings.

careers.heading: Build the operating system Tanzanian mining deserves.
careers.sub: Small team, deep mining context, Swahili-first. Hybrid Dar es Salaam / remote. We hire for taste, judgement, and care.

domain.title: Tanzania mining domain expert
domain.blurb: Senior mining engineer or geologist with deep PML/ML/SML and Tumemadini experience. You become the truth-teller for what our product must do.

engineer.title: Senior TypeScript engineer
engineer.blurb: Multi-tenant, Postgres, Hono, Next 15, AI-native. You ship end-to-end and treat every line as if it'll sit in a regulator's audit.

pilot.title: Pilot success manager
pilot.blurb: You live at our pilot sites. You know every operator by name. You translate field reality into product backlog every week.

values.heading: How we work
items: Swahili-first. English is the second language, not the default.
Field reality beats slide decks. Every PM visits a pilot site quarterly.
Cryptographic audit chain is non-negotiable. Every action signed.
Plain talk. We don't say synergy. We say what happened today.

about.heading: An operating system built for and by Tanzanian mining.
about.sub: Borjie was started by a small Tanzanian and diaspora team after watching another generation of operators run world-class deposits on spreadsheets.
about.originBody: We met across Geita and Dar es Salaam in 2024, swapping notes on why every mining ERP felt designed for someone else's country. By early 2026 we had a working Master Brain and ten pilots. The mission stayed the same: an operating system that respects how Tanzanian mining actually works — KYC for artisanal miners, royalty maths the TRA recognises, briefings in Swahili at 06:00.
about.teamSub: Tanzanian and diaspora. Mining, fintech, AI infrastructure. Hybrid Dar es Salaam.

values.title: Tanzanian-first
values.body: We optimise for the mine, the language, the regulator, and the currency our operators actually use.

values.title: Cryptographically honest
values.body: Every action sits on an append-only chain. Regulators, lenders, and operators can verify without trusting us.

values.title: Calm by default
values.body: Mining doesn't need another dashboard with red. The Master Brain handles overnight. Operators get a clear, restrained brief at 06:00.

statusPage.heading: Borjie status
statusPage.sub: Live status of our services and a 90-day uptime history.
statusPage.subscribeNote: This page refreshes every 30 seconds. For major incidents, we email all affected customers directly.
